name: Diabetic Cookie Brittle
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine margarine, vanilla, salt, and sugar replacement in a mixing bowl or food processor.
2. Beat until smooth.
3. Stir in flour, chocolate chips, and walnuts.
4. Press into an ungreased 15" x 10-inch pan.
5. Bake at 375°F for 25 minutes.
6. Remove from oven and score into 2" x 1-inch pieces.
7. Cool completely.
8. Break into candy pieces.
